title: Reported speech — пропуски
description: Раскрой прямую речь в reported или вставь недостающий глагол / союз.

items.text: «I work in Moscow» → He said he ___ in Moscow.
items.explain: Present Simple (work) → Past Simple (worked). Стандартный backshift.

items.text: «I have lost my keys» → She said she ___ her keys.
items.explain: Present Perfect (have lost) → Past Perfect (had lost). my → her.

items.text: «I'll call you tomorrow» → He said he would call me the ___ day.
items.explain: tomorrow → the next day / the following day. Оба варианта работают.

items.text: «Are you ready?» → He asked ___ I was ready.
items.explain: Reported yes/no question: asked + if/whether + S + V. Без знака вопроса.

items.text: «Where do you live?» → She asked where I ___.
items.explain: Reported wh-question: прямой порядок, без do, backshift (live → lived). Не «where did I live».

items.text: «Don't be late» → Mum ___ me not to be late.
items.explain: Imperative → told + obj + (not) to + V. tell обязательно с объектом.

items.text: He ___ me that the meeting had been moved.
items.explain: tell с объектом (told me). Если без объекта — нужно say (He said the meeting had been moved).

items.text: «I must finish this report» → He said he ___ finish that report.
«Can you help me?» → She asked if I ___ help her.
items.explain: can → could. Reported yes/no question: asked + if + S + V, прямой порядок.
Просьба (вежливо) → ask + obj + to + V. Для жёсткого приказа — told.
